title: helichrysum calocladum
intro: Helichrysum calocladum, a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, is native to South Africa and is commonly known as the yellow fever tea plant or yellow asterope. It has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and calm the body. The health benefits of Helichrysum calocladum include reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestion, and supporting immune function, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Helichrysum calocladum can be prepared as a tea, essential oil, or tincture, allowing for flexible and accessible use in herbal medicine.
